ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to display bookmark groups: 'separate modals' opens a new search for each group, while 'flatten all' shows all bookmarks with their group path.
ast.target: 选择如何显示书签组：“独立模态框”为每个组打开一个新搜索，而“全部展平”则显示所有书签及其组路径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose how to display bookmark groups: 'separate modals' opens a new search for each group, while 'flatten all' shows all bookmarks with their group path.
ast.target: 选择如何显示书签组：“独立模态框”为每个组打开一个新搜索，而“全部展平”则显示所有书签及其组路径。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enable separate commands for specific bookmark groups. These commands will appear in the command palette.
ast.target: 为特定书签组启用独立命令。这些命令将出现在命令面板中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No bookmark groups found; create groups in the bookmarks core plugin to enable group commands.
ast.target: 未找到书签组；在书签核心插件中创建组以启用组命令。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select bookmarks to hide from the search modal. Ignored bookmarks will not appear in search results.
ast.target: 选择要从搜索模态框中隐藏的书签。忽略的书签将不会出现在搜索结果中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No bookmarks found; add bookmarks in the bookmarks core plugin to manage them here.
ast.target: 未找到书签；在书签核心插件中添加书签以在此处管理它们。
